name: threatcaddy-extension
description: Browser extension for ThreatCaddy — quick capture notes from any page

scripts.build: npm run generate:icons && BROWSER=chrome node scripts/build.js && BROWSER=firefox node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:chrome: npm run generate:icons && BROWSER=chrome node scripts/build.js
scripts.build:firefox: npm run generate:icons && BROWSER=firefox node scripts/build.js
